ns1:revision.ns1:text:
[https://na.eventscloud.com/website/48957/home/ LUG 2023] was held at the Qualcomm Institute at the [https://ucsd.edu/ University of California San Diego (UCSD)] [https://www.sdsc.edu/ Supercomputing Center (SDSC)] May 1st-4th.
== LUG 2023 Agenda == === Monday, May 1 – Day 0 === [[Developer_Day_2023-05-01|Developer Day]]
=== Tuesday, May 2 – Day 1 === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 09:00-09:30''' |'''OpenSFS Welcome Remarks''' : Sarp Oral, OpenSFS
|- |''' 09:30-10:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-SDSC_Lustre_Experiences-Tatineni.pdf|Experiences and Approaches for Supporting Lustre for a Large User Environment]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=R6ofC9LzfZs video]) : Mahidhar Tatineni, SDSC
|- |''' 10:00-10:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Community_Release_Update-Jones.pdf|Community Release Update]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=WnlXZwVw2bA video]) : Peter Jones, Whamcloud
|- |''' 11:00-11:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Amazon_Lustre_FSX-Osborne.pdf|Bringing Lustre to the Masses Through a Fully-managed Cloud Service]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=0fMdtrCXxTM&pp=ygUPI2VpbnNjaHVsdWcyMDIz video]) : Darryl Osborne, Amazon
|- |''' 11:30-12:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Lustre_Client_Encryption-Buisson.pdf|Lustre Client Encrytion]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=4cQM-xoeqa0 video]) : Sebastien Buisson, DDN
|- |''' 13:30-14:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Understanding_Lustre_Timeouts-Mohr.pdf|Understanding Lustre Timeouts]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=MEQem0ZYIGE video]) : Richard Mohr, ORNL
|- |''' 14:00-14:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Client_Side_Data_Compression-Blagodarenko.pdf|Client-side Data Compression]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=fCQNL92fyuI video]) : Colin Faber, Artem Blagodarenko, Whamcloud
|- |''' 15:00-15:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Experiences_Stampede2_Frontera_TACC-Thorne.pdf|Experiences with Lustre on Stampede2 and Frontera]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=wkYBLBVOqQ0 video]) : Nick Thorne, TACC
|- |''' 16:00-16:30''' |'''OpenSFS Update''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Impua4iUqLY video]) : OpenSFS Board
|- |'''17:00-19:00''' |'''Welcome Reception''' : OpenSFS |}
=== Wednesday, May 3 – Day 2 === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 09:00-09:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Balanced_Production_Migration-CHarr.pdf|Getting a Balanced, Full Production File System Migration to Work]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=-PCXNCkoaQA video]) : Cameron Harr, LLNL
|- |''' 09:30-10:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Managing_Cloud_As_Code-Vaughn.pdf|Managing Cloud HPC with Infrastructure-as-Code]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=vN_7fT-0jQg video]) : Matthew Vaughn, Amazon
|- |''' 10:30-11:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Lustre_2.16_and_Beyond-Dilger.pdf|Lustre 2.16 and Beyond]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=a1VZ0WMgYIM video]) : Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud
|- |''' 11:00-11:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Delivering_Lustre_HPC_Cloud-Sundarraj.pdf|Delivering Lustre 2.15 Filesystem as an HPC Cloud Service]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=KCFr_d_ddFI&pp=ygUTI2F6dXJlbWFuYWdlZGx1c3RyZQ%3D%3D video]) : Dilip Sundarraj, Microsoft
|- |''' 11:30-12:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-KFILND_and_UDSP-Horn.pdf|Overview of Kfabric Network Driver, and User Defined Selection Policy]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=MMA-WcKqp5E&pp=ygUPI2VpbnNjaHVsdWcyMDIz video]) : Chris Horn, HPE
|- |''' 13:00-13:30''' |'''Sponsor Talk: [[Media:LUG2023-Maximizing_AI_Training_Efficiency-Druon.pdf|Maximizing At-Scale AI Training Efficiency]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=qBo8-70aBIA video]) : Raphael Druon, DDN
|- |''' 13:30-14:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Orion_Configuration_Performance-Mohr.pdf|The Orion File System: Configuration and Performance]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=Bj0oJq0sPmo video]) : Richard Mohr, ORNL
|- |''' 14:30-15:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Unaligned_DIO_v2-Farrell.pdf|Unaligned Direct I/O]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=UvcQ0h6FS6M video]) : Patrick Farrell, Whamcloud
|- |''' 15:00-15:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Secure_Namespace_Isolation-Ihara.pdf|Secure Namespace Isolation in Lustre]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=-JEKQHzbHQM video]) : Shuichi Ihara, Sebastien Buisson, DDN
|- |''' 16:00-16:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-PoliMOR_Policy_Engine-Brumgard.pdf|The PoliMOR Policy Engine: Improvements and Performance Results]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=-WGiRWl6qjQ video]) : Christopher Brumgard, ORNL
|- |''' 16:30-17:00''' |'''Invited Talk: [[Media:LUG2023-Prototype_National_Research_Platform-Wuerthwein.pdf|Prototype National Research Platform]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=ZMYugRitwjw video]) : Frank Würthwein, SDSC
|- |'''17:30-20:30''' |'''Ballast Point Social Event''' : Aeon Computing, DDN, Habana Labs |}
=== Thursday, May 4 – Day 3 === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 09:00-09:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-LNet_Large_NIDs-Simmons.pdf|LNet Large NID Support]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=80hK4EVRePw video]) : James Simmons, ORNL
|- |''' 09:30-10:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-ALCF_Community_Storage_Globus-Kulyavtsev.pdf|Community Storage Using Lustre and Globus Sharing]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HCiArPAM07Q video]) : Alex Kulyavtsev, ANL
|- |''' 10:30-11:00''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Metadata_WBC-Drokin.pdf|Metadata Writeback Caching]]''' ([https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=0m14PKV2Nls video]) : Oleg Drokin, Whamcloud
|- |''' 11:00-11:30''' |'''[[Media:LUG2023-Fast_IO_El_Capitan_Rabbit_Storage-Faaland.pdf|Fast I/O Through Big, Pointy Teeth: El Capitan and Rabbit Storage]]''' ([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xccViZtVye4 video]) : Olaf Faaland, LLNL
|- |''' 11:30-11:45''' |'''Closing Remarks''' : Megan Larko, OpenSFS
|}
[[Lustre User Group 2022|<- LUG'22]] | [[Lustre User Group 2024|LUG'24 ->]]
